items.name: aevox-theme
items.title: AeVox theme
items.description: The single drop-in stylesheet — AeVox tokens (light + dark), Tailwind v4 @theme, shadcn aliases, the aevox-overrides layer, primitive classes, scope/hero motifs, depth + scrollbar. Themes every stock shadcn component.

items.name: theme-provider
items.title: AeVox theme provider
items.description: ThemeProvider + useTheme() — light/dark + density, persisted, sets data-theme on <html>.

items.name: aevox-primitives
items.title: AeVox primitives
items.description: Sonar (voice motif), Stat (mono metric), StatusDot — the parts with no shadcn equivalent.

items.name: button
items.title: Button (AeVox)
items.description: shadcn Button + AeVox: cyan primary with depth, cyan outline, bordered secondary, press feedback.

items.name: badge
items.title: Badge (AeVox)
items.description: shadcn Badge + AeVox status tones (live/training/idle/warn/accent/neutral) and tag variant.

items.name: avatar
items.title: Avatar (AeVox)
items.description: shadcn Avatar + AeVox gradient orb tones on the fallback.
